title: Tamemount
description: Allows the Entity to be tamed by mounting it.

attempt_temper_mod.title: Attempt Temper Mod
attempt_temper_mod.description: The amount the entity's temper will increase when mounted.

autoRejectItems.title: AutoRejectItems
autoRejectItems.description:
The list of items that, if carried while interacting with the entity, will anger it.

Properties:
• item (string)

item.title: Item
item.description: Name of the item this entity dislikes and will cause it to get angry if used while untamed.

feed_items.title: Feed Items
feed_items.description:
The list of items that can be used to increase the entity's temper and speed up the taming process.

Properties:
• item (string)
• temper_mod (int) = 0

Sample values:
• llama: [{"item":"wheat","temper_mod":3},{"item":"hay_b...

item.title: Item
item.description: Name of the item this entity likes and can be used to increase this entity's temper.

temper_mod.title: Temper Mod
temper_mod.description: The amount of temper this entity gains when fed this item.

feed_text.title: Feed Text
feed_text.description:
The text that shows in the feeding interact button.

Sample values:
• llama: action.interact.feed

max_temper.title: Max Temper
max_temper.description:
The maximum value for the entity's random starting temper.

Sample values:
• llama: 30

min_temper.title: Min Temper
min_temper.description: The minimum value for the entity's random starting temper.

ride_text.title: Ride Text
ride_text.description:
The text that shows in the riding interact button.

Sample values:
• llama: action.interact.mount

tame_event.title: Tame Event
